testcase.name: test_get_license_partner_admin_forbidden
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter146_license_system.py:52: in partner_admin_token assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Partner admin login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Partner admin login failed: {"detail":"Invalid credentials"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
